headline: Property & Casualty Insurance Stocks Q4 Teardown: Erie Indemnity (NASDAQ:ERIE) Vs The Rest
summary: Wrapping up Q4 earnings, we look at the numbers and key takeaways for the property & casualty insurance stocks, including Erie Indemnity (NASDAQ:ERIE) and its peers.
